title: International Mobility Program: Authorization to work without a work permit – Expert witnesses or investigators - Canada.ca
content:
## International Mobility Program: Authorization to work without a work permit – Expert witnesses or investigators
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.
R186( o ) applies to experts who are entering to conduct surveys or analyses to be used as evidence, or persons who will be expert witnesses before a regulatory body, tribunal or court of law.
